scope: wave2 fan-out migration, partial: only the project-metadata stream is implemented. The releases stream (legacy internal/connectors/pypi's second stream) is out of scope for this pass -- see the ENGINE_GAP blocker in this migration's report -- the dialect's records.path can only extract a single array/object at one dotted path, and cannot flatten a map-of-arrays keyed by version string (PyPI's 'releases' object) while stamping each record with its own map key as a field value; this requires a StreamHook (Tier 2) or an engine records-extraction primitive that does not exist today. PyPI is read-only and credential-free in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: powers the releases stream's map-of-arrays flatten-with-key-stamp behavior, which the current records.path/computed_fields dialect cannot express; see this migration's blockers[] and docs.md Known limits
not implemented in this bundle; legacy never implemented the Simple API index
aggregate registry-wide statistics, not a per-project syncable object stream
